changeSummary: Upgraded purify-water-boiling: expanded from 5 to 7 steps with explicit rolling-boil definition, container guidance, and 24-hour storage limit; corrected altitude threshold from 2,000m to 5,000ft (1,500m) per EPA/FEMA consensus; warnings expanded from 2 to 4 including chemical-concentration risk; redFlags expanded from 2 to 5; replaced 3 source references with real URLs from EPA and CDC; added first-ever constraint metadata (responseRole=primary, blockedByConstraints=[no_boiling,no_fire,no_heat_source]) to enable fallback chain routing to bleach guide.
validationWarnings: Duplicate risk: purify-water-bleach and purifying-water-with-household-liquid-bleach cover identical scope. Recommend consolidating before assigning responseRole:backup to either.

Fallback chain incomplete: purify-water-bleach has no responseRole or constraintTags. No backup guide is boosted when boiling is unavailable. Follow-up run on purify-water-bleach required to complete the chain.
importedAt: pending — run run-import.sh from Mac to complete
note: VM sandbox cannot reach localhost:3000. Run 'bash run-import.sh' from the pipeline-dry-run-water folder on your Mac with the admin app running.
